description: Install .NET 8 SDK and CDK CLI, restore existing project, and verify baseline builds cleanly.
steps: Install .NET 8 SDK using the dotnet-install script at /tmp/dotnet-install.sh (already downloaded): bash /tmp/dotnet-install.sh --channel 8.0
Install AWS CDK CLI globally: unset NODE_OPTIONS && npm install -g aws-cdk
Run 'dotnet restore src/CdkBase.sln' to restore NuGet packages
Run 'dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln' to confirm the existing project compiles
Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx cdk synth' to confirm CDK synthesis works
acceptance_criteria: 'dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln' completes with exit code 0
'cdk synth' produces a CloudFormation template without errors
findings: dotnet-install.sh was NOT pre-downloaded at /tmp; had to download it to workspace and run from there. .NET 8.0.421 installed to $HOME/.dotnet. CDK CLI installed globally via npm. Must use 'export PATH=$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH && export DOTNET_ROOT=$HOME/.dotnet' before all dotnet commands. Must 'unset NODE_OPTIONS' before npm/npx commands. cdk synth produces CloudFormation template successfully.
